column1: Batch Cooking Schedule - February 1, 2026
10:30 AM: Start dashi stock (kombu cold soak 20 min; remove before simmer; add katsuobushi; steep 5 min; strain)
10:50 AM: Rice in pot (2 cups dry short grain; 3 cups water; bring to boil then low 18 min; rest 10 min covered)
11:00 AM: Prep vegetables (broccoli florets and carrot coins; toss in olive oil and sesame salt)
11:10 AM: Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Sheet pan ready.
11:15 AM: Marinate tofu (tamari, sesame oil, ginger, garlic, 20 min minimum; press tofu first)
11:20 AM: Vegetables into oven (25 to 30 min; flip halfway)
11:35 AM: Tofu stir-fry: high heat, sesame oil; tofu 4 min per side; snap peas last 3 min
11:50 AM: Grill salmon on stovetop grill pan (skin side down 5 min; flip 3 min; rest 2 min)
12:05 PM: Assemble miso soup (dashi; dissolve miso cold before adding; cubed tofu; simmer 3 min; green onion)
12:15 PM: Portion and container everything. Label by day.
Containers Planned
Monday: Rice bowl with roasted broccoli and carrots; tofu stir-fry; miso thermos
Tuesday (field day): Salmon over brown rice with snap peas; pack cold; include soy side
Wednesday: Tofu stir-fry with snap peas; brown rice; rice crackers
Thursday (field day): Brown rice with roasted vegetables; pack cold; add avocado
Friday: Miso soup remainder; rice; any leftover salmon or tofu
Date

column6: Smaller batch; fewer work dinners this week
Add to rice bowl and miso
Oatly; running low from last week

column1: Batch Cooking Schedule - February 15, 2026
10:30 AM: Dashi stock as standard
10:50 AM: Rice (1.5 cups dry; 2.25 cups water)
11:05 AM: Marinate ahi (tamari, sesame oil, ginger; 15 min max - ahi goes tough if marinated too long)
11:15 AM: Prep cucumber (thin slice; lightly salt; squeeze and drain)
11:25 AM: Thaw edamame in warm water
11:35 AM: Sear ahi (very hot pan; 90 sec per side; rare center; slice after resting)
11:45 AM: Assemble miso soup with wakame and edamame
12:00 PM: Build poke-style bowls: rice, ahi, edamame, cucumber, avocado, green onion, sesame seeds, splash tamari
Containers Planned
Monday: Poke bowl (rice, ahi, edamame, avocado, cucumber)
Tuesday (field): Rice and edamame cold box; avocado packed separately
Wednesday: Leftover ahi sliced cold; miso soup; edamame salad
Thursday (field): Same as Tuesday rotation
Friday: Miso and rice; finish remaining components
